intended_use: Hyper Insight - ICH is a notification-only workflow tool for trained clinicians to identify patients' brain CT images and share them with medical specialists in parallel with standard patient care wor
intended_use_full: Hyper Insight - ICH is a notification-only workflow tool for trained clinicians to identify patients' brain CT images and share them with medical specialists in parallel with standard patient care workflow. Hyper Insight - ICH uses deep learning-based AI algorithms to analyze images to find suspected intracranial hemorrhage and notifies and shares the findings to medical specialists. Identification of images with suspected intracranial hemorrhage is for notification purposes only, not diagnostic purposes.
ground_truth: Reading results of intracranial hemorrhage from brain CT images by Reference Standard Establishment Committee (trained neuro-radiologists)
other_metrics: Average time to alerting specialist: 16.39±5.46 seconds (0.27±0.091 minutes); 95% CI for sensitivity [91.55, 97.90]; 95% CI for specificity [95.59, 99.68]; 95% CI for AUC [0.9738, 0.9989]
